subcodes.first_line: O beloved of God in the land of Alif! Hearken unto the call of your Lord, the All-Merciful. Verily, there is none other God but Him; unto Him belongeth all majesty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احباء الله فی ارض الالف ان استمعوا ندآء ربکم الرحمن انه لا اله الا هو له العظمه
subcodes.subjects: @acting according to the exigencies of the day; pragmatism, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action, @wisdom [hikmat], @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
